_instructions: UI sound effects for the game interface. Each effect has a 'name' (friendly display name), 'file' (filename once generated), 'tags' array, and 'usage' describing where in the UI it should be used. Run generate-ui-sfx.js to generate the audio files.

effects.name: Gold Coin Drop
effects.usage: Generic button click — default for most buttons
effects.prompt: A single small gold coin landing on a wooden tavern table with a bright metallic clink, close and clear, very short

_generated.prompt: A single small gold coin landing on a wooden tavern table with a bright metallic clink, close and clear, very short

effects.name: Parchment Unfurl
effects.usage: Opening a menu, panel, or modal
effects.prompt: A parchment scroll being quickly unfurled and unrolled on a table, papery and crisp, short duration

_generated.prompt: A parchment scroll being quickly unfurled and unrolled on a table, papery and crisp, short duration

effects.name: Parchment Roll Up
effects.usage: Closing a menu, panel, or modal
effects.prompt: A parchment scroll being quickly rolled back up and tucked away, soft papery sound, short duration

effects.usage: Confirming a selection — class picked, race chosen, settings saved

effects.usage: Create Game button — an exciting, fun herald call to adventure
effects.prompt: A thrilling magical whoosh that builds into a bright orchestral stinger with shimmering chimes, a snappy snare hit, and a triumphant horn note that soars upward — joyful, energetic, and adventurous like opening a magical portal to a new world, with a sparkling fairy-dust tail that fades fast
